name: KRN-7000
description: KRN7000 has been used in trials studying the treatment of Lung Cancer, Chronic Hepatitis C, Hepatitis B, Chronic, Unspecified Adult Solid Tumor, Protocol Specific, and Prevention of GvHD in Patients With Hematological Malignancies Undergoing AHSCT.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of KRN-7000.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with KRN-7000.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with KRN-7000.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with KRN-7000.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of KRN-7000.
